name: every option-bearing tool in the catalog now has a Layer-2 render mapping, so its options have a defined emission target
command: ruby -ryaml -e 'c=YAML.unsafe_load_file(ARGV[0])["tools"]; miss=c.select{|k,v| v["option_form"] && !v["render"]}.keys; STDERR.puts("without_render=#{miss.inspect}"); exit(miss.empty? ? 0 : 1)' "$CLAUDE_PLUGIN_ROOT/standards/tool-option-surfaces.yaml" && echo every-option-tool-has-render 1>&2
